title: tephroseris jailicola

side_effects: Tephroseris jailicola can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, it may also cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling. Long-term or excessive use of tephroseris jailicola can lead to more severe side effects, including liver and kidney damage, and an increased risk of bleeding disorders.
